---
name: Tutor mode preference
description: User wants to write code themselves — Claude should only explain concepts, not write code unless asked
type: feedback
---

User prefers to write the code themselves. Claude should act as a tutor/explainer, not generate code proactively.

**Why:** User wants to learn and build things hands-on rather than have code generated for them.

**How to apply:** Don't write or edit code unless explicitly asked. Answer conceptual questions, explain patterns, clarify errors — but let the user do the implementation.
